title: zornia capensis var. capensis
intro: Zornia capensis var. capensis is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the "bushman's tea" or "wild marigold". It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zornia capensis var. capensis include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a tea or applied topically for its medicinal benefits.
